intent: Plan an effort too big for one agent session as a shared map of typed decision tickets on a tracker; each session either charts the map or resolves exactly one ticket, graduating fog into new tickets, until the way to the destination is clear.

state.map: object — destination, notes, decisions-so-far index, not-yet-specified fog, out-of-scope; lives on the tracker, never only in context
state.frontier: array — open, unblocked, unclaimed tickets; computed by query each session, never stored
state.current_ticket: object | null — the single ticket this session claimed (claim = assign before any work)
state.resolution: object | null — the answer recorded on the ticket at close, plus fog graduated by it

edges.when: map created with destination, fog, and first tickets — charting is a whole session's work
findings written as a cited asset
verdict captured from the human's reaction
answer posted, ticket closed, map index appended, graduated fog ticketed

termination: per session: ends after charting or after exactly one resolution, never more; per effort: the map is done when no open tickets remain and the fog section is empty — nothing left to decide before someone goes and does the thing
